notes: Point Distribution, EHB Data, EHP Data, Master, and Categories are treated as primary inputs.
EHP Exp and Rank can be parsed from formula text when cached workbook values contain errors.

tiles.label: Complete 5 learner raids with someone who has 0 kc. Learner must go deathless in one of the raids
tiles.rules:
ToB, HMT, CoX, CM, Regular and Expert TOAs count for this task.
The learners must have 0kc at the start of bingo in any of these to count for this task.
Screenshots should be provided for the end of each of the 5 learner raids.

tiles.label: Torva piece from scratch
tiles.rules:
One screenshot from a Torva piece from Nex is required.
Screenshots of enough Bandos drops to make the Bandosian components are required. Can be across multiple team members.

tiles.label: Fortified Masori from scratch
tiles.rules: One screenshot of a Masori piece is required. Enough screenshots of Armadyl drops to make enough Armadylean plates for that Masori piece are required. Drops can be across multiple team members.

tiles.label: Receive a GM time at one of the raids, half of the team must not have the GM time already
tiles.rules: Screenshot of the Combat Achievements earned by half the raid members is required at the end of the raid. Any raid GM time is valid for this tile.

tiles.label: Receive kit/dust from a raid (HMT/CMs)
tiles.rules: Screenshot of dust or kit is required

tiles.label: PVM/Skilling Pet
tiles.rules:
Screenshot of pet is required.
Pets not allowed for this tile are:
Skotos
Chompy Chick
Pet Chaos Elemental
Beef
Dom

tiles.label: 4 Big Fish (Uniques)
tiles.rules:
4 different big fish must be screenshotted across the team.
The same fish from two team members is not allowed.
Valid fish include:
Big Shark
Big Bass
Big Harpoonfish
Big Swordfish
Giant Blue Krill
Golden Haddock
Orangefin
Huge Halibut
Purplefin
Swift Marlin

tiles.label: 2 Oathplate Pieces
tiles.rules:
Screenshot of 2 Oathplate drops required.
Helm, Chest, and Legs are valid.
Crafting from shards is not allowed.

tiles.label: Revenant Totem
tiles.rules:
Screenshot of any totem from Revenants is required.
Revenant Maledictus is allowed.

tiles.label: Receive 5m in pks
tiles.rules: Screenshots of Clan Chat messages or Loot keys are required to sum to over 5m.

tiles.label: Complete a TOB Kc with 0 Strength Bonus
tiles.rules:
At least one member must stream on Discord and show gear and inventory to an officer. Screenshot required at end of raid.
No items are allowed that provide any strength bonus at all. Kick those Nylos, son.

tiles.label: Fletching Knife
tiles.rules: Screenshot required of obtaining a fletching knife. Only rummaging Vale offerings is valid for this tile - purchasing from the shop is not allowed.

tiles.label: Odium/Malediction Ward
tiles.rules: All 3 drops for one ward must be screenshotted. Drops can be across multiple team members.

tiles.label: Complete a chambers with the gear when it came out (no tbow)
tiles.rules: Any items added after 5 January 2017 are not allowed for this tile. Raid must be streamed in Discord for an officer and screenshot of all team members required at end of the raid.

tiles.label: Crystal tool from scratch
tiles.rules:
Crystal axe, crystal pickaxe, and crystal harpoon are valid for this tile.
Both the crystal tool seed and dragon item are required, and screenshots are required for both.

tiles.label: 15 pieces of moons/barrows gear
tiles.rules: Screenshots of each item are required. Duplicates are valid.

tiles.label: 5 Raid clog Purples
tiles.rules:
Any raid is valid. A raid purple must be a new collection log for the raid member to count for this tile. Screenshots required.
Capes, kits, dust, pets, etc. are not valid.

tiles.label: Complete Contractually Unbound CA
tiles.rules: Screenshot required of the combat achievement at end of the Yama kill. Any of the contracts that earn the CA are valid for this tile.

tiles.label: First to shooting star
tiles.rules: Screenshot of the in-game chat message showing the member is the first to discover the star is required.

tiles.label: 1m+ clue scroll reward
tiles.rules:
Screenshot required of chat message showing clue reward value.
Any clue tier or Mimic is valid for this tile.

tiles.label: Amascut's Remnant CA
tiles.rules: Screenshot required of team member earning the Combat Achievement is required.

tiles.label: Merfolk Trident
tiles.rules: Screenshot of unlocking the Merfolk Trident required. A screenshot of either the collection log message or purchasing from the shop is valid for this tile.

tiles.label: 3 LMS wins
tiles.rules: Screenshot of in-game chat message of each of the LMS wins required for this tile. Multiple team members in the same LMS game is allowed.

tiles.label: DWH/Maul
tiles.rules: Screenshot of Dragon Warhammer or Elder Maul is required for this tile.

tiles.label: Jar
tiles.rules: Screenshot of any Jar drop is valid for this tile.

tiles.label: Bryophyta Essence or Hill Giant Club
tiles.rules: Screenshot of either the Bryophyta Essence or Hill Giant Club drop is required for this tile.

tiles.label: Champion Scroll
tiles.rules: Any champion scroll drop is valid for this tile. Screenshot required.

tiles.label: 50 BA High Gambles
tiles.rules:
Screenshot of either the collection log before and after or loot tracker is required for this tile. Multiple team members can contribute to the required amount.

One person on the team is required to stream all BA runs for this tile.
If done solo, streaming is required.

Pet instantly completes this tile.

tiles.label: 3 blood shards
tiles.rules: Screenshots required. Thieving or killing Vyres are both valid for this tile.

tiles.label: Tome Set
tiles.rules:
Screenshots required for each:
Tome of Water
Tome of Earth
Tome of Fire
Multiple team members can contribute to this tile.

tiles.label: 3 Zulrah Uniques
tiles.rules:
Screenshots required for each drop. 
Valid drops include:
Tanzanite Fang
Magic Fang
Serpentine Visage
Magma Mutagen
Tanzanite Mutagen

Scales, Teleport, Pet, Onyx, and Jar are not valid for this tile.

tiles.label: Abyssal Dye or Fishing Barrel or Tackle Box
tiles.rules:
Screenshots required.
To obtain a Fishing Barrel or Tackle Box after you already have one, the original must be destroyed.
Any of these three items completes this tile.

tiles.label: Bottled Storm and Broken Dragon Hook
tiles.rules: Screenshot required of both items for this tile.

tiles.label: 10 Raid non-clog Purples
tiles.rules: Screenshot of each raid purple is required for this tile. Any of the three raids are valid - existing collection log purples only.

tiles.label: 3 Cerberus Crystals
tiles.rules:
Screenshots required of each drop.
Valid crystals are:
Primordial Crystal
Eternal Crystal
Pegasian Crystal

Smouldering Stone is not valid for this tile.

tiles.label: Colosseum New Collection Log
tiles.rules: Screenshot of new collection log earned from Colosseum required for this tile. Pet and sunfire splinters are not valid for this tile.

tiles.label: 3 Inferno CA's
tiles.rules: Screenshot required for each earned Combat Achievement from the Inferno required for this tile. CAs can be earned across multiple team members. If you have earned a CA on another account, you are not eligible to earn that CA on any account.

tiles.label: Nightmare/PNM Drop
tiles.rules:
Screenshot required of any Nightmare Unique.
Valid drops include:
Inquisitor's Mace
Inquisitor's great helm
Inquisitor's hauberk
Inquisitor's plateskirt
Nightmare Staff
Volatile Orb
Harmonised Orb
Eldrich Orb

Pet, jar, tablet, and Parasitic Egg are not valid.

tiles.label: All 4 SRA Pieces
tiles.rules: Screenshots of each of the 4 SRA pieces are required for this tile. Drops can be spread across multiple team members.

tiles.label: Twinflame Staff
tiles.rules: Screenshots of the Ice Element Crown and Fire Element Crown are required for this tile. Drops can be obtained across multiple team members.

tiles.label: Sulfur Blades, Glacial Temotli, and Earthbound Tecpatl
tiles.rules: Screenshots of each of the three item drops are required. Drops can be from multiple team members.

tiles.label: 5 Strange Old Lockpicks
tiles.rules: Screenshots of each Strange Old Lockpick are required. Multiple team members can contribute to this tile.

tiles.label: Complete a tob with the gear available when it came out (no Scythe)
tiles.rules: Any items released after 7 June 2018 are not allowed for this tile from all raid members. Thralls are not allowed. Raid must be streamed in Discord to an officer. Screenshot required at the end of the raid.

tiles.label: Corp Sigil or Elixir
tiles.rules:
Screenshot of drop required. 
Valid drops include:
Elysian Sigil
Arcane Sigil
Spectral Sigil
Holy Elixir

tiles.label: Dragon Metal Lump, Slice, Limbs, or Full Helm
tiles.rules: Screenshot required of any of the three items dropping.

tiles.label: Sarachnis Cudgel or Dragon Chainbody
tiles.rules: Screenshot of either item required.

tiles.label: Rancour from Scratch
tiles.rules:
Screenshots of a Zenyte drop and an Araxyte Fang drop are both required.
Drops can be submitted by different team members.

tiles.label: Voidwaker From Scratch
tiles.rules:
Screenshot of each of the three Voidwaker pieces is required.
Drops can be obtained from either the single or multi bosses.
Drops can be submitted across multiple team members.

tiles.label: 2 Doom Uniques
tiles.rules:
Screenshots of 2 Doom uniques required for this tile. Drops can be from multiple team members.
Valid drops are:
Dom
Avernic Treads
Eye of Ayak
Mokhaiotl Cloth

awards.label: But you have heard of me
